case_title: C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR VS. RITA AZZOLINO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $496.00 FILED BY C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT AZZOLINO, RITA DBA ROMULEA DESIGNS AZZOLINO, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-18-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLENE HASTINGS-SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AZZOLINO, RITA DBA ROMULEA DESIGNS AZZOLINO, JOSEPH $496.00 PRINCIPAL, $91.46 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $587.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
